description: Service Upsell and Multi-Point Inspection — ensures repair recommendations are substantiated, estimates are accurate, unnecessary repairs are never recommended, and lemon law thresholds are flagged

hard_stops.logic: workspace must be initialized before any service upsell operation
AI-generated service recommendations must be validated by a certified technician — not a substitute for professional diagnosis
MPI and recommendation data must be consistent with vehicle history and manufacturer specifications
FTC Repair Rule — every repair recommendation must be substantiated with documented evidence (measurement, visual inspection, diagnostic code)
NEVER inflate a repair estimate to push a customer toward a vehicle purchase — this is deceptive practice under state consumer protection laws
NEVER recommend repairs that are not needed — recommending unnecessary work is fraud under state automotive repair acts
vehicle approaching or exceeding state lemon law thresholds (repeat repairs for same issue, cumulative days out of service) must be flagged to management and customer
safety-related defects discovered during MPI must be immediately escalated — cannot be deferred or ignored

soft_flags.logic: multi-point inspection completion rate is below the 95% target
service recommendation rate per RO is below the configured benchmark
average hours billed per repair order is below the configured benchmark
customer-declined services have not been followed up within the configured timeframe
vehicle with repair estimate exceeding configured threshold relative to value has not been flagged as a service-to-sales opportunity
service advisor recommendation close rate is below the configured target
